Core Collection

Antimicrobial Scrub Sets

V-neck scrub tops paired with comfortable scrub pants. All treated with antimicrobial, fluid-resistant, and stretch-enhanced fabric technology.

Classic navy V-neck top with chest pocket, matching straight-leg scrub pants with elastic waist.

Lab Coats & Jackets

Ankle-length professional coat, 4-button front, 4 pockets, wrinkle-resistant fabric.

Budget-friendly option for medical students. Durable fabric, 2 pockets, easy care.

Infection Control

Surgical Wear & Gowns

Sterile and non-sterile surgical wear designed for operating rooms, isolation units, and infection-control environments.

High Demand SKU: FSC-004

Surgical Isolation Gown - Level 2

AAMI Level 2 compliant, wrap-around back tie, knitted cuffs, fluid-resistant SMS fabric.

$12-18 MOQ: 100 pcs
Level 3 SKU: FSC-014

Reinforced Surgical Gown - Level 3

AAMI Level 3, reinforced front and sleeves, velcro neck closure, breathable barrier fabric.

$15-22 MOQ: 100 pcs
SKU: FSC-015

Patient Exam Gown

Overlap back closure, tie-neck, comfortable poly-cotton blend, one-size with generous fit.

$8-12 MOQ: 100 pcs
Disposable SKU: FSC-016

Disposable Protective Coverall

Full-body coverage, hooded, elastic cuffs/ankles, zip front with flap, Type 5/6 certified.

$6-10 MOQ: 200 pcs

Technical Excellence

Fabric Technologies

Every healthcare garment is engineered with purpose-built fabric technology for demanding clinical environments.

Antimicrobial Treatment

Silver-ion or zinc-pyrithione treatment kills 99.9% of bacteria. Effective for 50+ industrial washes.

Fluid Resistance

AAMI Level 2-3 fluid barrier protection. Prevents cross-contamination in clinical settings.

4-Way Stretch

Poly-spandex blend provides unrestricted movement. Bends, stretches, and moves with the wearer.

Moisture Wicking

Quick-dry technology pulls sweat away from the body. Keeps staff cool during long shifts.

Wrinkle Release

Industrial laundry compatible. Maintains professional appearance wash after wash.

Odor Control

Embedded odor-neutralizing technology keeps scrubs fresh throughout 12+ hour shifts.

Why Healthcare Brands Choose Us

Manufacturing for Medical Excellence

🏥

Hospital-Grade Standards

AAMI compliant, ISO 13485 ready, FDA registered facility. Infection-control protocols at every step.

⚡

Fast Turnaround

Samples in 5-7 days. Bulk production in 14-21 days. Rush orders available for urgent restocking.

📦

Low MOQ

Start with just 50 pieces per style for scrub sets. 100 pieces for surgical wear. Perfect for testing.

✏

Private Label Ready

Your branded labels, woven tags, embroidery, and custom packaging. Full brand identity integration.

Ready to Launch Your Scrub Line?

Get a free quote with sample pricing and production timeline. Hospital contracts, retail brands, and startup labels welcome.
